hero.title: Juan Perez
hero.role: Full Stack Developer — 10+ years building web products and enterprise platforms
hero.description: Specialized in Laravel, React and TypeScript. I have contributed to platforms moving over $385M in grants, generating 1M+ Travel Tech clicks, and operating across Chile, Venezuela and the United States.

about.title: About me
paragraphs: I combine technical execution, product vision and business strategy to build full-stack platforms that scale to millions of users.
I enjoy traveling, discovering new cultures and moving through unfamiliar contexts; that curiosity translates into adaptability, clear communication and ease working with international teams.

I have built booking systems, SaaS dashboards, payment integrations, CRM workflows and automation for internationally operating companies, always focused on ownership, continuous learning and reliable delivery.

cards.title: Full Stack Engineering
cards.description: End-to-end architecture, from REST APIs to high-conversion React interfaces.

cards.title: Product and SaaS strategy
cards.description: From idea to launch: workflow design, business models and growth.

cards.title: International profile
cards.description: Experience in Travel Tech, remote teams, multicultural communication and automation with real-world impact.

skills.title: My skills
skills.description: A blend of engineering, product and infrastructure shaped through more than ten years of real-world delivery.

services.title: Services
items: Multi-tenant products with subscriptions, dashboards and billing.
Real-time availability, payments and inventory management.
Panels with metrics, reports and role-based access.
Smart workflows that save hours of manual work.
Lead capture, follow-up and automated messaging.
Stripe, Mercadopago and local methods, ready to charge.
Fast pages optimized for conversion and SEO.
From idea to a working product in weeks, not months.
Custom apps to automate your team's operations.
I connect third-party services with your platform.
Legal CRM, case files, documents and billing.
Testing and pipelines to ship with confidence.
Events, RSVP, check-in and social experiences.

items.description: Migrated key components to Next.js, led the redesign and implementation of three core React modules, and integrated third-party services. I also contributed to regular code reviews and refactoring to improve maintainability.
items.highlight: 30% faster SSR · 20% higher engagement · 20% less technical debt

items.description: Spent six months on the padel booking app: real-time court reservation flows, skill- and location-based matchmaking, online payments with Stripe and Mercadopago, and ratings and missions systems.
items.highlight: iOS and Android apps · multi-currency payments · live in 9+ countries

items.description: Worked three months on the omnichannel retail CRM: features on top of the Customer Data Platform, multichannel campaign automation, e-commerce integrations and online/offline impact reporting.
items.highlight: CRM used by 300+ brands · 4.8 on Capterra

items.description: Implemented Gmail authentication with JWT, optimized critical services, and restructured the application to improve code quality and maintainability while introducing AWS architectures.
Redesigned infrastructure using Elastic Beanstalk, Route 53 and EC2. Reorganized the project structure and implemented CI/CD pipelines for faster and more reliable deployments.
items.highlight: Faster deployments through CI/CD and AWS architecture

items.description: Built REST APIs, refactored business logic in legacy systems and handled production incidents. For Delosi, applied code splitting to reduce bundle size and improve page load time.
items.highlight: Supported 10K+ daily users and 500K+ registered users · load time reduced to 1.5 s

items.description: Implemented new features and API integrations, including reCAPTCHA, and contributed to design and development decisions for the logistics platform.
items.highlight: New security workflows and e-commerce integrations

items.description: Shipped SmartMarket on iOS, improved automatic service assignment for ZagaTaxi and resolved WebSocket concurrency issues in ZagaSport.
items.highlight: iOS app shipped in one week · 40% faster taxi response · 50% better performance

items.description: Developed a reusable application library that improved the shared foundation across features and significantly reduced application startup time.
Developed and maintained corporate websites and content-managed solutions built with WordPress and MySQL.
Built, customized and maintained WordPress websites, themes and manageable content for multiple clients.

projectsPage.title: All projects
projectsPage.description: SaaS, Travel Tech, Legal Tech and community platforms designed and developed from end to end.

blog.title: Notes & articles
blog.description: Learnings on full-stack development, SaaS, Travel Tech and digital product.
blog.empty: New articles coming soon. Check back in a few days.

projects.name: FlightEpic
projects.summary: A flight platform serving travelers to and from Venezuela with 24+ airlines, multi-currency payments and real-time booking operations.
projects.overview: FlightEpic brings flight search, quoting, payment and international booking management into one experience for Venezuelan travelers.
projects.challenge: Connect multiple providers, keep fares fresh, reduce fraud and accept both local and international payment methods.
projects.solution: I designed a Laravel and React architecture with Redis caching, an operations dashboard, lead CRM, payment validation and resilient booking workflows.
features: Zelle, Binance and local bank payments

projects.name: JustFund
projects.summary: Enterprise SaaS for foundations and nonprofits with multi-step applications and funder collaboration.
projects.overview: The United States' first common grant application platform connects mission-driven organizations with funding opportunities.
projects.challenge: Simplify complex applications without losing data, enable collaboration and deliver an accessible experience to thousands of organizations.
projects.solution: I built multi-step workflows, autosave, advanced filters and a reusable component library documented in Storybook.

projects.name: Nexo Abogados
projects.summary: A Chilean legal directory and CRM for independent lawyers and law firms.
projects.overview: Nexo Abogados helps people find legal representation while enabling professionals to manage clients, cases, documents and billing.
projects.challenge: Unify client acquisition and legal operations with multi-firm permissions and document automation.
projects.solution: I defined architecture, infrastructure and roadmap while guiding the evolution of CRM, PDF generation, scheduling, billing and access control.

projects.name: Envíamelo
projects.summary: An Argentine logistics platform for quoting, managing and tracking e-commerce shipments.
projects.overview: Envíamelo simplifies logistics for online stores and businesses shipping orders across Argentina.
projects.challenge: Integrate carriers, present clear rates and centralize shipment statuses in a simple experience.
projects.solution: I developed quoting, order management, tracking and operational workflows for digital commerce teams.

projects.name: 92118 Collective
projects.summary: A platform for local businesses featuring events, RSVP, QR check-in and artificial intelligence.
projects.overview: A digital community experience connecting local businesses, residents and events.
projects.challenge: Manage events and attendance through a simple mobile experience for both users and organizers.
projects.solution: I built RSVP workflows, QR check-in, admin dashboards and AI integrations on Next.js and Supabase.

projects.name: Zaga System
projects.summary: Zaga System's app ecosystem: the SmartMarket marketplace, ZagaTaxi ride-hailing and the ZagaSport sports platform.
projects.overview: I developed and maintained the mobile apps and backends of Zaga System, a technology company operating across Latin America and Spain.
projects.challenge: Ship SmartMarket on iOS under tight deadlines, automate service assignment in ZagaTaxi and solve real-time concurrency in ZagaSport.
projects.solution: I built Laravel and Node.js backends, integrated push notifications and WebSockets, and optimized each app's critical flows.

projects.name: WoowUp
projects.summary: A leading omnichannel retail CRM in Latin America, with a Customer Data Platform that unifies online and in-store data.
projects.overview: I worked as a freelancer for three months on WoowUp, the omnichannel marketing platform used by 300+ retail brands.
projects.challenge: Unify online and offline customer data and orchestrate personalized multichannel campaigns at scale.
projects.solution: I built features on top of the Customer Data Platform, campaign automation, e-commerce integrations and sales impact reporting.

projects.name: PLAYMIX
projects.summary: A mobile app to book courts, play padel and organize matches with players at your level.
projects.overview: I worked as a freelancer for six months on PLAYMIX, a mobile app connecting padel players, clubs and trainers across 9+ countries.
projects.challenge: Deliver real-time court reservations, match players by skill and location, and process payments in multiple currencies.
projects.solution: I implemented native iOS and Android apps with a real-time backend, Stripe and Mercadopago payments, ratings and a missions and progression system.
